attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who can exploit mountain stages, demonstrated by winning from the break on Col de l'Izoard. Shows ability to finish after sustained climbing efforts.
team_tactics: Operates with freedom in breakaways on stages where team leader not directly threatened. Functions beyond pure domestique duties when tactical situation allows.
terrain_preference: High mountain finishes where climbing endurance combines with finishing speed advantage over pure climbers. Can resist late GC rider chases while maintaining sprint.
vulnerability: Limited data, but role likely restricted when team leader requires direct support. Single-race sample suggests opportunistic rather than sustained stage-hunting approach.
key_patterns: Won from breakaway on major HC climb, indicating strong climbing capability beyond domestique expectations.
Outsprinted specialist in two-up finish, showing versatile finishing ability after hard climbing.
Successfully resisted chase from elite GC climber, demonstrating tactical awareness and positioning strength.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single mid-season 2017 observation shows strong form with stage win, but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
